signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (with "180-199" at 29% implied probability) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (crowd assigning 18% to 1080-1119 range).[2][3][4] These tweet markets dominate with over $17.1M
